title: PerceptionRubrics: Calibrating Multimodal Evaluation to Human Perception
innovation_summary: PerceptionRubrics: Calibrating Multimodal Evaluation to Human Perception: We introduce PerceptionRubrics, a rubric-based evaluation framework that addresses the gap between saturated benchmark scores and real-world brittleness.
